seoTitle: Mount Warrigal vs Mount Werong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Warrigal and Mount Werong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Warrigal vs Mount Werong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Warrigal and Mount Werong.
heading: Mount Warrigal vs Mount Werong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Warrigal, New South Wales and Mount Werong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Warrigal has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mount Werong (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Warrigal or Mount Werong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Warrigal has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Mount Werong scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Warrigal scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Werong scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Warrigal or Mount Werong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Warrigal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
